title: INDIAN EDUCATION PROGRAM - 211info
text: CHIFIN NATIVE YOUTH CENTER INDIAN EDUCATION PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers learning, leadership, and cultural activities that engage Native youth and support a positive cultural identity. Provides culturally appropriate educational support to Native students, including tutoring and credit recovery, and supports Native families’ involvement in students’ education. 1084 G Street Springfield, OR 97477 Eligibility: Native American and Alaskan Native students and their families Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm (541) 726-4301 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 726-4301 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish by arrangement AREA SERVED: Springfield Public Schools Services: Cultural Heritage Programs * Native American Community Parent/Family Involvement in Education * Native American Community Tutoring Services * Native American Community If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CHIFIN NATIVE YOUTH CENTER
